name: Gate
description:
Library component. Models a gate as in `bd gate` -- a piece of state that's `open` while the gate's external dependency is unresolved, and transitions to `closed` once Deacon confirms the dependency is satisfied.

Real gastown: `internal/cmd/gate.go`, `cmd/bd/gate.go:818 closeGate()`. The Gate actor here is the persistent state row; the transition Open -> Closed corresponds to `closeGate()` writing status=closed.

The parked Polecat conceptually waits for this transition. Without the proposed prime-side self-heal in #3587, Polecat needs Deacon to send a wake message between gate-close and any session-death window; the model demonstrates that race.

CLOSE_IN.description: receives a Close message from Deacon when bd gate check determines the dependency is resolved. Tagged 'Close'.

actors.name: Gate
actors.owner: Single piece of state representing one gate. Open while waiting for the upstream dependency to resolve; transitions to Closed when Deacon's bd gate check confirms resolution.

triples.event: Deacon's bd gate check closes this gate (dependency resolved)
